intents.label: NONE
intents.description: The line is neutral, practical, cooperative, or purely observational.

intents.label: WARM
intents.description: The line reaches toward closeness, emotional openness, or shows vulnerability and trust.

intents.label: SEEKING
intents.description: The line is curious, explorative, or reaches for understanding — asking back or engaging with genuine interest.

intents.label: RESISTING
intents.description: The line is guarded, defensive, deflecting, or pushes the other person away without hostility.

intents.label: DISTANT
intents.description: The line withdraws emotionally — cold, dismissing, or shutting down the conversation.
